item.title: The interface that disappears
item.description: The best tools get out of the way. You stop noticing the hammer and start noticing the house. Software so rarely manages this — it keeps reminding you that it is software.

item.title: Why I stopped chasing inbox zero
item.description: An empty inbox is a measure of how much time you spent on email, not of how much you got done. I have made my peace with the number being large.
